gameTitle: The Legend of Zelda: Phantom Hourglass

achievements.title: Permission Shmermission
achievements.description: Learn swordplay from Oshus after raiding his storage.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: A Vision of Darkness
achievements.description: Rescue Astrid, the fortuneteller on the Isle of Ember.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Dig to the Center of the Earth!
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Where the Wind Blows
achievements.description: Reach the Isle of Gust for the first time.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: A Short Fuse
achievements.description: Defeat Cyclok within 45 seconds (DSi mode not supported).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Mental Reflection
achievements.description: Solve the crest puzzle in the second section of the Temple of the Ocean King.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Minimalist
achievements.description: Defeat Crayk using at most one arrow.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Quadruple Break Up
achievements.description: Win at Dead Man's Volley and earn the Ghost Key using thirty-six sword swings or fewer.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Two in a Row
achievements.description: Obtain the Northeastern Sea chart while having obtained neither the Bombchu bag nor the grappling hook.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Seamless Relay
achievements.description: Complete Dongorongo's first phase without switching between Link and Gongoron more than eight times.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Why Don't Ya Just Shoot Him?
achievements.description: Complete Dongorongo's second phase without using your sword on it.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: One Head Is Better than Two
achievements.description: Defeat Gleeok and take its Sand of Hours without taking damage.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Hammer Time!
achievements.description: Defeat Eox within 2:30 (DSi mode not supported).
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Pristine Path
achievements.description: Complete the Temple of the Ocean King with 25:00 remaining in the Phantom Hourglass.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Eroding Will
achievements.description: Complete the Temple of the Ocean King from beginning to end within 5:30 without replenishing sand.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Leech Killer
achievements.description: Defeat Bellum's first phase without your life energy dipping three hearts below its maximum.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: The Green Baron
achievements.description: Defeat Bellum's second phase without your ship being damaged more than six times.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Defender of the Seas
achievements.description: Defeat Bellum's final phase while taking less than three hearts of damage and without any spirit abilities equipped.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Be the Crane
achievements.description: Salvage treasure without damaging the Salvage Arm.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Rollin', Rollin', Rollin'
achievements.description: Finish the Goron Game in thirty seconds or less.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Second Intention
achievements.description: Score a total of 90 hits in a row during training without getting hit yourself.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Action Port
achievements.description: Get a score of 2640 in the cannon minigame.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Renowned Angler
achievements.description: Catch all five major species of fish.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Double Hero
achievements.description: Score more than 200 hits during training.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Sharpshooter
achievements.description: Get a combo of 25 or more at the Shooting Range.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Thorough Exorcism
achievements.description: Get a score of 2000 or more at the Shooting Range.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: The Sands of Time
achievements.description: Fill the Phantom Hourglass with 25 minutes' worth of Sand of Hours.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: Armed to the Teeth
achievements.description: Get all bomb, Bombchu, and quiver upgrades.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: The Virtue of Balance
achievements.description: Upgrade all spirits' abilities to Level 2.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor

achievements.title: A Wish for Freedom
achievements.description: Save the World of the Ocean King from Bellum's influence.
achievements.author: AlmightyXor
